Wolf Freedom of Religion or Belief Victims List Country Profiles Defending Freedoms Project Publications " class="we-megamenu-nolink"> Annual Reports Contact Us Facebook Twitter YouTube Instagram Search Cuba View the Cuba chapters in our annual reports > Recent News Events Publications Advising Government The Cuban government’s legal framework for controlling religious activity extends state authority over virtually all worship and practice, and religious leaders and communities continually face threats and harassment. The government criminalizes and heavily persecutes unregistered religious groups, and it continues to wrongfully imprison religious leaders while denying prisoners their religious freedom rights across the prison system.
